• Show All Code
  • Hide All Code

02C.GrowthRate_Mass

Elliott Schmidt

2026-04-17

Load libraries

library(tidyverse) # data manipulation
library(ggpubr) # producing data exploratory plots
library(modelsummary) # descriptive data 
library(glmmTMB) # running generalised mixed models 
library(DHARMa) # model diagnostics 
library(performance) # model diagnostics  
library(ggeffects) # partial effect plots 
library(car) # running Anova on model 
library(emmeans) # post-hoc analysis  
library(MuMIn) 
library(patchwork) 
library(ggridges)

Import data

setwd("C:/Users/elliott/OneDrive/jc527762/PhD dissertation/Data/Chapter3_Heritability_ARCHIVED")
hatch <- read_csv("import_data/hatchling_size_data_2022_2023.csv") |> 
  mutate(across(1:21,factor)) |> 
  drop_na(MASS)

reprod.data <- read_csv("import_data/clutch_data_2022_2023.csv") |> 
  mutate(across(c(1:7,16,23), factor))  |> 
  mutate(PROJECT_CODE =factor(PROJECT_CODE))

m1 <- read_csv("import_data/1_month_size_data_2022_2023.csv") |> 
  mutate(across(1:15,factor)) |> 
  mutate(STANDARD_LENGTH =LENGTH, 
         .keep = "unused") |> 
  select(!(NOTES)) |> 
  select(1:15,"STANDARD_LENGTH","MASS") |> 
  group_by(CLUTCH_NUMBER) |> 
  mutate(DENSITY = n()) |> 
  ungroup()
           
m2 <- read_csv("import_data/2_month_size_data_2022_2023.csv") |> 
  mutate(across(1:15,factor)) |> 
  mutate(STANDARD_LENGTH=LENGTH, 
         .keep = "unused") |> 
  select(!(NOTES)) |> 
  select(1:15,"STANDARD_LENGTH","MASS")|> 
  group_by(CLUTCH_NUMBER) |> 
  mutate(DENSITY = n()) |> 
  ungroup()

m3 <- read_csv("import_data/2-5_month_size_data_2022_2023.csv") |> 
  mutate(across(1:14,factor)) |> 
  mutate(STANDARD_LENGTH =LENGTH, 
         .keep = "unused") |> 
  select(!(NOTES)) |> 
  select(1:15,"STANDARD_LENGTH","MASS")|> 
  group_by(CLUTCH_NUMBER) |> 
  mutate(DENSITY = n()) |> 
  ungroup()

adult <- read_csv("import_data/adult_size_2022_2023.csv") |> 
  mutate(across(1:3,factor), 
         MALE = FISH_ID, 
         FEMALE = FISH_ID, 
         POPULATION = str_sub(FISH_ID, 2,4), 
         POPULATION = case_when(POPULATION == "ARL" ~ "Arlington Reef", 
                                POPULATION == "SUD" ~ "Sudbury Reef",
                                POPULATION == "VLA" ~ "Vlassof cay",
                                POPULATION == "PRE" ~ "Pretty patches", 
                                TRUE ~ POPULATION)) |> 
  left_join(select(m3, c("MALE","TEMPERATURE")), 
             by="MALE") |> 
  left_join(select(m3, c("FEMALE","TEMPERATURE")), 
             by="FEMALE") |>
  distinct() |> 
  mutate(TEMPERATURE = coalesce(TEMPERATURE.x, TEMPERATURE.y)) |> 
  drop_na(TEMPERATURE) |> 
  select(-c("TEMPERATURE.x","TEMPERATURE.y"))

Data manipulation

hatch_df_all <- hatch |> 
  left_join(select(adult, c("MALE", "SL", "MASS")), 
            by ="MALE") |> 
  mutate(SL_MALE =SL.y, 
         MASS_MALE =MASS.y, 
         .keep = "unused") |>
  left_join(select(adult, c("FEMALE", "SL", "MASS")), 
            by ="FEMALE") |> 
  mutate(SL_FEMALE =SL, 
         MASS_FEMALE =MASS, 
         .keep ="unused") |> 
  mutate(SL_MIDPOINT = (SL_MALE+SL_FEMALE)/2, 
         MASS_MIDPOINT = (MASS_MALE+MASS_FEMALE)/2, 
         PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT =DAYS_IN_TREATMENT, 
         DENSITY =1, 
         AGE_DAYS=0) |> 
  rename(MASS =MASS.x) |> 
  filter(MASS <0.05) |> 
  select(c("CLUTCH_NUMBER","MALE","FEMALE","REGION","POPULATION","TEMPERATURE",
           "TANK","CLUTCH_ORDER","PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT","DENSITY","AGE_DAYS","MASS", 
           "SL_MALE","MASS_MALE")) |> 
  mutate(AGE ="hatch") 

clutches <- reprod.data |> filter(PROJECT_CODE %in% c("1","3","5","7")) |>
  select(CLUTCH_NUMBER)

hatch_df_all <- clutches |> 
  inner_join(hatch_df_all, by="CLUTCH_NUMBER")|> 
  droplevels()

m1_df_all <- m1 |> 
  left_join(select(adult, c("MALE", "SL", "MASS")), 
            by ="MALE") |> 
  mutate(SL_MALE =SL, 
         MASS_MALE =MASS.y, 
         .keep = "unused") |>
  left_join(select(adult, c("FEMALE", "SL", "MASS")), 
            by ="FEMALE") |> 
  mutate(SL_FEMALE =SL, 
         MASS_FEMALE =MASS, 
         .keep ="unused") |> 
  mutate(SL_MIDPOINT = (SL_MALE+SL_FEMALE)/2, 
         MASS_MIDPOINT = (MASS_MALE+MASS_FEMALE)/2, 
         AGE_DAYS=30) |> 
  group_by(CLUTCH_NUMBER) |> 
  mutate(MEDIAN_MASS = median(MASS.x)) |>
  rename(MASS =MASS.x) |>
  drop_na(MASS) |>
  ungroup()  |> 
  select(c("CLUTCH_NUMBER","MALE","FEMALE","REGION","POPULATION","TEMPERATURE",
           "TANK","CLUTCH_ORDER","PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT","DENSITY","AGE_DAYS","MASS", 
           "SL_MALE","MASS_MALE")) |> 
  mutate(AGE ="1months")

m2_df_all <- m2 |> 
  left_join(select(adult, c("MALE", "SL", "MASS")), 
            by ="MALE") |> 
  mutate(SL_MALE =SL, 
         MASS_MALE =MASS.y, 
         .keep = "unused") |>
  left_join(select(adult, c("FEMALE", "SL", "MASS")), 
            by ="FEMALE") |> 
  mutate(SL_FEMALE =SL, 
         MASS_FEMALE =MASS, 
         .keep ="unused") |> 
  mutate(SL_MIDPOINT = (SL_MALE+SL_FEMALE)/2, 
         MASS_MIDPOINT = (MASS_MALE+MASS_FEMALE)/2, 
         AGE_DAYS=60) |> 
  rename(MASS = MASS.x) |> 
  drop_na(MASS)  |> 
  select(c("CLUTCH_NUMBER","MALE","FEMALE","REGION","POPULATION","TEMPERATURE",
           "TANK","CLUTCH_ORDER","PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT","DENSITY","AGE_DAYS","MASS", 
           "SL_MALE","MASS_MALE")) |> 
  mutate(AGE ="2months")

m3_df_all <- m3 |> 
  left_join(select(adult, c("MALE", "SL", "MASS")), 
            by ="MALE") |> 
  mutate(SL_MALE =SL, 
         MASS_MALE =MASS.y, 
         .keep = "unused") |>
  left_join(select(adult, c("FEMALE", "SL", "MASS")), 
            by ="FEMALE") |> 
  mutate(SL_FEMALE =SL, 
         MASS_FEMALE =MASS, 
         .keep ="unused") |> 
  mutate(SL_MIDPOINT = (SL_MALE+SL_FEMALE)/2, 
         MASS_MIDPOINT = (MASS_MALE+MASS_FEMALE)/2) |> 
  rename(MASS =MASS.x)  |> 
  select(c("CLUTCH_NUMBER","MALE","FEMALE","REGION","POPULATION","TEMPERATURE",
           "TANK","CLUTCH_ORDER","PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT","DENSITY","AGE_DAYS", "MASS", 
           "SL_MALE","MASS_MALE")) |> 
  mutate(AGE ="2.5months")

growth_data <- rbind(hatch_df_all, m1_df_all, m2_df_all, m3_df_all) |> 
  mutate(AGE =factor(AGE), 
         AGE_DAYS =as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 
         MALE =factor(MALE)) |> 
  mutate(AGE =fct_relevel(AGE, c("hatch","1months","2months","2.5months"))) |> 
  drop_na(AGE_DAYS, MASS)
ggplot(growth_data, aes(x=AGE_DAYS, y=MASS, color=TEMPERATURE)) + 
  geom_point() + 
  stat_smooth(method="lm")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

Descriptive statistics

Descriptive statistics

sample_size_growthrate_mass <- growth_data  |> 
  group_by(TEMPERATURE, MALE, FEMALE, POPULATION, CLUTCH_NUMBER) |> 
  summarise(n =n(), .groups = "drop"); sample_size_growthrate_mass
write.csv(sample_size_growthrate_mass, "../../sample_size_growthrate_mass.csv")

Models

Random factors

modelNULL <- glmmTMB(MASS ~ 1, 
                  family=gaussian(),
                  data =growth_data)

model1 <- glmmTMB(MASS ~ (1|MALE), 
                  family=gaussian(),
                  data = growth_data)

AIC(modelNULL, model1) 
BIC(modelNULL, model1)

Main hypothesis

model1a <- glmmTMB(MASS ~ scale(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS))*TEMPERATURE + scale(DENSITY, center=TRUE) + scale(MASS_MALE, center=TRUE) + (1| MALE),
                   family=gaussian(), 
                   dispformula = ~AGE,
                   data=growth_data)

model1a.p2 <- glmmTMB(MASS ~ poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS),2, raw = TRUE)*TEMPERATURE + scale(DENSITY, center=TRUE) + scale(MASS_MALE, center=TRUE) + (1| MALE),                 
                   family=gaussian(), 
                   dispformula = ~AGE,
                   data=growth_data)
## Warning in finalizeTMB(TMBStruc, obj, fit, h, data.tmb.old): Model convergence
## problem; function evaluation limit reached without convergence (9). See
## vignette('troubleshooting'), help('diagnose')

Alternative hypothesis

model1b.p2 <- glmmTMB(MASS ~ poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS),2)*TEMPERATURE + scale(DENSITY, center=TRUE) + scale(as.numeric(PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT), center=TRUE) + (1| MALE),                 
                   family=gaussian(), 
                   dispformula = ~AGE,
                   data=growth_data)

Model selection

AIC(model1a, model1a.p2,model1b.p2,  k=6) 
BIC(model1a, model1a.p2,model1b.p2)

model1b.p2 has the lowest AIC but the model does not reach convergence, there moving forward model1a.p2 was used.

Model validation

DHARMa

model1b.p2 |> 
  simulateResiduals(plot=TRUE)  

## Object of Class DHARMa with simulated residuals based on 250 simulations with refit = FALSE . See ?DHARMa::simulateResiduals for help. 
##  
## Scaled residual values: 0.54 0.596 0.476 0.544 0.328 0.404 0.464 0.552 0.256 0.176 0.5 0.364 0.292 0.256 0.26 0.24 0.348 0.284 0.176 0.18 ...
model1b.p2 |> testResiduals(plot=T)  

## $uniformity
## 
##  Asymptotic one-sample Kolmogorov-Smirnov test
## 
## data:  simulationOutput$scaledResiduals
## D = 0.020966, p-value = 0.01557
## alternative hypothesis: two-sided
## 
## 
## $dispersion
## 
##  DHARMa nonparametric dispersion test via sd of residuals fitted vs.
##  simulated
## 
## data:  simulationOutput
## dispersion = 1.0014, p-value = 0.976
## alternative hypothesis: two.sided
## 
## 
## $outliers
## 
##  DHARMa outlier test based on exact binomial test with approximate
##  expectations
## 
## data:  simulationOutput
## outliers at both margin(s) = 60, observations = 5523, p-value = 0.01879
## alternative hypothesis: true probability of success is not equal to 0.007968127
## 95 percent confidence interval:
##  0.008300071 0.013961836
## sample estimates:
## frequency of outliers (expected: 0.00796812749003984 ) 
##                                             0.01086366

performance

check_model(model1b.p2, detrend =FALSE)
## `check_outliers()` does not yet support models of class `glmmTMB`.

Partial effect plots

model1b.p2 |> ggemmeans(~AGE_DAYS|TEMPERATURE) |> 
  plot() 

model1b.p2 |> ggemmeans(~TEMPERATURE) |> 
  plot()

model1b.p2 |> ggemmeans(~DENSITY) |> 
  plot()

model1b.p2 |> ggemmeans(~PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT) |> 
  plot()

Model investigation

Summary

model1b.p2 |> summary()
##  Family: gaussian  ( identity )
## Formula:          
## MASS ~ poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 2) * TEMPERATURE + scale(DENSITY,  
##     center = TRUE) + scale(as.numeric(PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT),  
##     center = TRUE) + (1 | MALE)
## Dispersion:            ~AGE
## Data: growth_data
## 
##       AIC       BIC    logLik -2*log(L)  df.resid 
##  -28095.3  -27989.4   14063.6  -28127.3      5507 
## 
## Random effects:
## 
## Conditional model:
##  Groups   Name        Variance  Std.Dev. 
##  MALE     (Intercept) 4.881e-07 0.0006986
##  Residual                    NA        NA
## Number of obs: 5523, groups:  MALE, 34
## 
## Conditional model:
##                                                                Estimate
## (Intercept)                                                   1.910e-01
## poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 2)1                                1.264e+01
## poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 2)2                                4.152e+00
## TEMPERATURE28.5                                               4.548e-03
## TEMPERATURE30                                                 1.989e-03
## scale(DENSITY, center = TRUE)                                 3.499e-03
## scale(as.numeric(PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT), center = TRUE)  8.280e-04
## poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 2)1:TEMPERATURE28.5                2.334e-01
## poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 2)2:TEMPERATURE28.5               -1.297e-01
## poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 2)1:TEMPERATURE30                 -9.538e-02
## poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 2)2:TEMPERATURE30                 -3.708e-01
##                                                              Std. Error z value
## (Intercept)                                                   2.008e-03   95.14
## poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 2)1                                2.172e-01   58.17
## poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 2)2                                1.668e-01   24.89
## TEMPERATURE28.5                                               3.312e-03    1.37
## TEMPERATURE30                                                 2.931e-03    0.68
## scale(DENSITY, center = TRUE)                                 2.814e-03    1.24
## scale(as.numeric(PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT), center = TRUE)  2.256e-05   36.71
## poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 2)1:TEMPERATURE28.5                2.580e-01    0.90
## poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 2)2:TEMPERATURE28.5                1.394e-01   -0.93
## poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 2)1:TEMPERATURE30                  2.281e-01   -0.42
## poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 2)2:TEMPERATURE30                  1.222e-01   -3.03
##                                                              Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)                                                   < 2e-16 ***
## poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 2)1                                < 2e-16 ***
## poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 2)2                                < 2e-16 ***
## TEMPERATURE28.5                                               0.16963    
## TEMPERATURE30                                                 0.49729    
## scale(DENSITY, center = TRUE)                                 0.21374    
## scale(as.numeric(PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT), center = TRUE)  < 2e-16 ***
## poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 2)1:TEMPERATURE28.5                0.36553    
## poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 2)2:TEMPERATURE28.5                0.35206    
## poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 2)1:TEMPERATURE30                  0.67578    
## poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 2)2:TEMPERATURE30                  0.00242 ** 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1

## Dispersion model:
##              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)

## ---

Anova

model1b.p2 |> Anova()

Confint

model1b.p2 |> confint()
##                                                                           2.5 %
## cond.(Intercept)                                                   0.1871079216
## cond.poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 2)1                               12.2099041091
## cond.poly(as.numeric(AGE_DAYS), 2)2                                3.8254276502

## cond.TEMPERATURE30                                                -0.0037551419

Post-hoc analysis

model1b.p2 |> emtrends(var ="AGE_DAYS", type="response") |> summary()
model1b.p2 |> emtrends(var ="AGE_DAYS", type="response") |> pairs()|> summary(adjust="tukey")
model1b.p2 |> emtrends(var ="AGE_DAYS", type="response", at = list(AGE_DAYS = c(0, 30, 60, 77.4))) |> pairs()|> summary(adjust="tukey") |> filter(contrast %in% c(
    "AGE_DAYS0 TEMPERATURE27 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS0 TEMPERATURE28.5 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",
    "AGE_DAYS0 TEMPERATURE27 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS0 TEMPERATURE30 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",  
    "AGE_DAYS0 TEMPERATURE28.5 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS0 TEMPERATURE30 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",
    
    "AGE_DAYS30 TEMPERATURE27 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS30 TEMPERATURE28.5 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",
    "AGE_DAYS30 TEMPERATURE27 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS30 TEMPERATURE30 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",  
    "AGE_DAYS30 TEMPERATURE28.5 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS30 TEMPERATURE30 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",
    
    "AGE_DAYS60 TEMPERATURE27 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS60 TEMPERATURE28.5 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",
    "AGE_DAYS60 TEMPERATURE27 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS60 TEMPERATURE30 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",  
    "AGE_DAYS60 TEMPERATURE28.5 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS60 TEMPERATURE30 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",
    
    "AGE_DAYS77.4 TEMPERATURE27 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS77.4 TEMPERATURE28.5 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",
    "AGE_DAYS77.4 TEMPERATURE27 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS77.4 TEMPERATURE30 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",  
    "AGE_DAYS77.4 TEMPERATURE28.5 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS77.4 TEMPERATURE30 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623"
    ))
        

model1b.p2 |> emtrends(var ="AGE_DAYS", type="response", at = list(AGE_DAYS = c(0, 30, 60, 77.4))) |> pairs() |> confint() |> filter(contrast %in% c(
    "AGE_DAYS0 TEMPERATURE27 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS0 TEMPERATURE28.5 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",
    "AGE_DAYS0 TEMPERATURE27 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS0 TEMPERATURE30 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",  
    "AGE_DAYS0 TEMPERATURE28.5 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS0 TEMPERATURE30 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",
    
    "AGE_DAYS30 TEMPERATURE27 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS30 TEMPERATURE28.5 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",
    "AGE_DAYS30 TEMPERATURE27 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS30 TEMPERATURE30 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",  
    "AGE_DAYS30 TEMPERATURE28.5 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS30 TEMPERATURE30 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",
    
    "AGE_DAYS60 TEMPERATURE27 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS60 TEMPERATURE28.5 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",
    "AGE_DAYS60 TEMPERATURE27 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS60 TEMPERATURE30 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",  
    "AGE_DAYS60 TEMPERATURE28.5 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS60 TEMPERATURE30 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",
    
    "AGE_DAYS77.4 TEMPERATURE27 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS77.4 TEMPERATURE28.5 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",
    "AGE_DAYS77.4 TEMPERATURE27 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS77.4 TEMPERATURE30 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623",  
    "AGE_DAYS77.4 TEMPERATURE28.5 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623 - AGE_DAYS77.4 TEMPERATURE30 DENSITY20.1754481260185 PARENTAL_DAYS_IN_TREATMENT21.6253847546623"
    ))

Summary figure

growth <- emmeans(model1b.p2, ~ AGE_DAYS*TEMPERATURE, 
                 at =list(AGE_DAYS=seq(from =min(growth_data$AGE_DAYS), to =max(growth_data$AGE_DAYS), by=.5)))

growth.df <- as.data.frame(growth)

growth.obs <- drop_na(growth_data, AGE_DAYS, MASS, TEMPERATURE) |> 
  mutate(Pred =predict(model1b.p2, re.form=NULL, type ='response'), 
         Resid =residuals(model1b.p2, type ='response'), 
         Fit =Pred+Resid) 

growth.obs.summarize <-  growth.obs |> 
  group_by(TEMPERATURE, AGE) |> 
  summarise(mean.growth =mean(Fit, na.rm=TRUE), 
            mean.growth.age =mean(AGE_DAYS, na.rm = TRUE), 
            sd.growth =sd(Fit, na.rm =TRUE), 
            n.growth = n()) |> 
  mutate(se.growth = sd.growth / sqrt(n.growth), 
         lower.ci.growth =mean.growth - qt(1-(0.05/2), n.growth -1) * se.growth, 
         upper.ci.growth =mean.growth + qt(1-(0.05/2), n.growth -1) * se.growth) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(mean.growth.age =case_when(AGE =="2.5months" ~ 77.40, 
                                    TRUE ~ mean.growth.age)) 
## `summarise()` has regrouped the output.
## ℹ Summaries were computed grouped by TEMPERATURE and AGE.
## ℹ Output is grouped by TEMPERATURE.
## ℹ Use `summarise(.groups = "drop_last")` to silence this message.
## ℹ Use `summarise(.by = c(TEMPERATURE, AGE))` for per-operation grouping
##   (`?dplyr::dplyr_by`) instead.
growth.plot <- ggplot(data = growth.df, aes(x=AGE_DAYS, y=emmean)) + 
  stat_smooth(aes(color=TEMPERATURE), 
              method = "lm", 
              formula =y~poly(x ,2, raw=TRUE)) + 
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin=asymp.LCL, ymax=asymp.UCL, fill=TEMPERATURE), alpha=0.3) + 
  geom_pointrange(data = growth.obs.summarize, aes(x =mean.growth.age, 
                                                  y =mean.growth, 
                                                  ymin =mean.growth -sd.growth, 
                                                  ymax =mean.growth +sd.growth, 
                                                  color = TEMPERATURE), 
                  size=1) +  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#69d7d8","#ff9c56", "#903146")) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values =c("#69d7d8","#ff9c56", "#903146")) +
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,30), breaks = seq(0,30,by=5))+
  xlab("Age (Days)") + 
  ylab("Offspring mass (g)") + 
  ggtitle("Offspring growth - Mass") +
  theme_classic()+theme(legend.position = 'none')
growth.obs2 <- growth.obs |> filter(AGE != "hatch") 
growth.plot2 <- ggplot(growth.obs2, aes(y=AGE, x=Fit, fill=TEMPERATURE, color=TEMPERATURE)) + 
  geom_density_ridges2(alpha =0.5, 
                       rel_min_height = 0.0001, 
                       scale =2, 
                       quantile_lines =TRUE, 
                       quantile_fun =median) + 
  #facet_wrap(~AGE) +
  #scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.37,35), breaks = seq(0,35,by=5)) +  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#69d7d8","#ff9c56", "#903146")) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values =c("#69d7d8","#ff9c56", "#903146")) +
  ylab("")+xlab("Mass (g)")+
  theme_classic()+ 
  theme(legend.position = 'none'); growth.plot2
## Picking joint bandwidth of 0.0252

hatching.obs <- growth.obs |> filter(AGE == "hatch") 
hatch.plot <- ggplot(hatching.obs, aes(y=AGE, x=Fit, fill=TEMPERATURE, color=TEMPERATURE)) + 
  geom_density_ridges2(alpha =0.5, 
                       rel_min_height = 0.0001, 
                       scale =3, 
                       quantile_lines =TRUE, 
                       quantile_fun =median) + 
  #facet_wrap(~AGE) +
  #scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.37,35), breaks = seq(0,35,by=5)) +  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#69d7d8","#ff9c56", "#903146")) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values =c("#69d7d8","#ff9c56", "#903146")) +
  theme_classic()+ xlab("Mass (g)")+ylab("Age")+
  theme(legend.position = 'none'); hatch.plot
## Picking joint bandwidth of 0.000229

layout <- "
AAAAA
BBCCC
"
growth.plot + hatch.plot + growth.plot2 + plot_layout(design = layout)
## Picking joint bandwidth of 0.000229
## Picking joint bandwidth of 0.0252

growthrate_mass <- growth.plot + hatch.plot + growth.plot2 + plot_layout(design = layout)
pdf("../../Figure_files/SF05.growthrate_mass-fixed.pdf", growth.plot, width=12, height =10)
growthrate_mass
dev.off()

Coefficient of variance [within-pair-variance]

cv_within <- growth.obs |> 
  group_by(MALE, AGE) |> 
  mutate(mean_value =mean(Fit), 
         sd_value =sd(Fit), 
         CV =(sd_value/mean_value) * 100) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-c("Pred","Fit","Resid")) |> 
  distinct(MALE,AGE, .keep_all=TRUE)  

cv_among <- cv_within |> 
  group_by(TEMPERATURE, AGE) |> 
  mutate(mean_among =mean(CV), 
         sd_among =sd(CV), 
         cv_among =(sd_among/mean_among)*100) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  distinct(cv_among, .keep_all = T) |> 
  arrange(TEMPERATURE) |> 
  select(c("TEMPERATURE","AGE","mean_among","sd_among","cv_among"))
cv_among

model comparisons

within_var <- lm(CV ~ AGE_DAYS*TEMPERATURE, 
                 data=cv_within) 

within_var.p2 <- lm(CV ~ poly(AGE_DAYS, 2, raw=TRUE)*TEMPERATURE, 
data =cv_within)

AICc(within_var, within_var.p2, k=3)

model validation

DHARMa

within_var.p2 |> 
  simulateResiduals(plot=TRUE)  

## Object of Class DHARMa with simulated residuals based on 250 simulations with refit = FALSE . See ?DHARMa::simulateResiduals for help. 
##  
## Scaled residual values: 0.92 1 0.476 0.396 0.54 0.5 0.456 0.948 0.748 0.32 0.548 0.236 0.368 0.148 0.304 0.372 0.368 0.588 0.76 0.444 ...
within_var.p2 |> testResiduals(plot=T)  

## $uniformity
## 
##  Asymptotic one-sample Kolmogorov-Smirnov test
## 
## data:  simulationOutput$scaledResiduals
## D = 0.085938, p-value = 0.3009
## alternative hypothesis: two-sided
## 
## 
## $dispersion
## 
##  DHARMa nonparametric dispersion test via sd of residuals fitted vs.
##  simulated
## 
## data:  simulationOutput
## dispersion = 0.93751, p-value = 0.624
## alternative hypothesis: two.sided
## 
## 
## $outliers
## 
##  DHARMa outlier test based on exact binomial test with approximate
##  expectations
## 
## data:  simulationOutput
## outliers at both margin(s) = 2, observations = 128, p-value = 0.2716
## alternative hypothesis: true probability of success is not equal to 0.007968127
## 95 percent confidence interval:
##  0.001897893 0.055302590
## sample estimates:
## frequency of outliers (expected: 0.00796812749003984 ) 
##                                               0.015625

performance

check_model(within_var.p2, detrend =FALSE)

model investigation

summary(within_var.p2)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = CV ~ poly(AGE_DAYS, 2, raw = TRUE) * TEMPERATURE, 
##     data = cv_within)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -18.739  -5.756  -1.118   5.646  26.700 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                                                 Estimate Std. Error t value
## (Intercept)                                    15.081315   2.471106   6.103
## poly(AGE_DAYS, 2, raw = TRUE)1                  0.896244   0.154719   5.793
## poly(AGE_DAYS, 2, raw = TRUE)2                 -0.008498   0.001918  -4.431
## TEMPERATURE28.5                                -5.935142   3.679681  -1.613
## TEMPERATURE30                                  -4.897365   3.499848  -1.399
## poly(AGE_DAYS, 2, raw = TRUE)1:TEMPERATURE28.5 -0.172616   0.227034  -0.760
## poly(AGE_DAYS, 2, raw = TRUE)2:TEMPERATURE28.5  0.003845   0.002800   1.373
## poly(AGE_DAYS, 2, raw = TRUE)1:TEMPERATURE30   -0.121698   0.223628  -0.544
## poly(AGE_DAYS, 2, raw = TRUE)2:TEMPERATURE30    0.002382   0.002812   0.847
##                                                Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                                    1.34e-08 ***
## poly(AGE_DAYS, 2, raw = TRUE)1                 5.77e-08 ***
## poly(AGE_DAYS, 2, raw = TRUE)2                 2.10e-05 ***
## TEMPERATURE28.5                                   0.109    
## TEMPERATURE30                                     0.164    
## poly(AGE_DAYS, 2, raw = TRUE)1:TEMPERATURE28.5    0.449    
## poly(AGE_DAYS, 2, raw = TRUE)2:TEMPERATURE28.5    0.172    
## poly(AGE_DAYS, 2, raw = TRUE)1:TEMPERATURE30      0.587    
## poly(AGE_DAYS, 2, raw = TRUE)2:TEMPERATURE30      0.399    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 8.33 on 119 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.6088, Adjusted R-squared:  0.5825 
## F-statistic: 23.14 on 8 and 119 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16
Anova(within_var.p2)

partial plots

within_var.p2 |> ggemmeans(~AGE_DAYS|TEMPERATURE) |> 
  plot() 

within_var.p2 |> ggemmeans(~TEMPERATURE) |> 
  plot()

within_var.p2 |> ggemmeans(~AGE_DAYS) |> 
  plot()

summary figure

cv_within.summarize <-  cv_within |> 
  group_by(TEMPERATURE, AGE) |> 
  summarise(mean.cv =mean(CV, na.rm=TRUE), 
            mean.cv.age =mean(AGE_DAYS, na.rm = TRUE), 
            sd.cv =sd(CV, na.rm =TRUE), 
            n.cv = n()) |> 
  mutate(se.cv = sd.cv / sqrt(n.cv), 
         lower.ci.cv =mean.cv - qt(1-(0.05/2), n.cv -1) * se.cv, 
         upper.ci.cv =mean.cv + qt(1-(0.05/2), n.cv -1) * se.cv) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(mean.cv.age =case_when(AGE =="2.5months" ~ 77.40, 
                                    TRUE ~ mean.cv.age)) 
## `summarise()` has regrouped the output.
## ℹ Summaries were computed grouped by TEMPERATURE and AGE.
## ℹ Output is grouped by TEMPERATURE.
## ℹ Use `summarise(.groups = "drop_last")` to silence this message.
## ℹ Use `summarise(.by = c(TEMPERATURE, AGE))` for per-operation grouping
##   (`?dplyr::dplyr_by`) instead.
cv_within <- cv_within |> 
  mutate(AGE_DAYS =case_when(AGE =="2.5months" ~ 77.40, 
                                    TRUE ~ AGE_DAYS))


cv.plot <- ggplot(cv_within.summarize, aes(x=AGE, y=mean.cv, color = TEMPERATURE)) + 
  geom_jitter(data =cv_within, aes(x=AGE, y=CV), 
              width=0.1, 
              alpha=0.3, 
              size =2)+
  geom_pointrange(aes(x =AGE, 
                      y =mean.cv, 
                      ymin =lower.ci.cv, 
                      ymax =upper.ci.cv, 
                      color = TEMPERATURE), 
                  size=1.25) +  
  geom_point(data=cv_among, aes(x=AGE, y=cv_among, color="Among CV"),
             shape =15, 
             size =4, 
             show.legend = TRUE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("27"="#69d7d8","28.5"="#ff9c56", "30"="#903146","Among CV"="black")) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values =c("27"="#69d7d8","28.5"="#ff9c56", "30"="#903146","Among CV"="black")) +
  ylab("COEFFICIENT OF VARIATION") +
  facet_wrap(~TEMPERATURE) +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.x =element_text(angle=90, vjust=-0 ), 
        legend.position = "right"); cv.plot
## Warning: No shared levels found between `names(values)` of the manual scale and the
## data's fill values.
